challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should log 'Sorted array: ' to the console.
You should log the numbers array to the console after logging 'Sorted array: '.

description:
Sada kada je numbers sortirano, logujte 'Sorted array: ' na konzolu, praćen nizom numbers.

S time, algoritam spajanja je završen.
